name: NPK 20-5-10 Fertiliser
instructions: Dissolve 2 tablespoons in 1 litre of water. Apply to soil base only. Avoid contact with leaves.
warnings: Keep pets away for 24 hours after application

name: NPK 10-5-5 Balanced Fertiliser
instructions: Sprinkle evenly around the drip line. Water in thoroughly. Do not let granules touch stems.
warnings: Do not over-apply — causes salt burn

name: Neem Oil Concentrate
instructions: Mix 2 tsp neem oil with a few drops of dish soap in 1 litre of water. Shake well and spray all leaf surfaces including undersides. Apply in the evening to avoid sun scorch.
warnings: Do not apply in direct sunlight

name: Copper Hydroxide Fungicide
instructions: Mix 3g powder per litre of water. Apply as a fine spray covering all plant surfaces. Repeat every 7 days until symptoms resolve.
warnings: Toxic to fish and aquatic life — do not use near water bodies

name: Liquid Seaweed Extract
instructions: Dilute 5ml in 1 litre water. Use as foliar spray every 3 weeks or as a soil drench monthly. Excellent for stress recovery.

name: High-Potassium Fruit Booster
instructions: Mix 10ml per litre and apply during the fruiting stage. Increases fruit size and sweetness.
warnings: Do not use during vegetative stage
